purpose: Keep competitor-strength claims tied to measured evidence classes, typed blockers, and next benchmark gates.

claim_boundary.summary: Do not claim ELF beats, ties, or loses to a project unless the named scenario is encoded and run at a comparable evidence class.
claim_boundary.current_live_real_world_boundary: ELF and qmd have full-suite live_real_world sweeps, but both are typed non-pass sweeps, not full-suite live passes.
claim_boundary.research_gate_boundary: Research-gate records are routing evidence for future adapters and must not be counted as fixture-backed, live-baseline, or live-real-world pass evidence.
claim_boundary.operator_boundary: Private corpus and credentialed production-ops checks remain blocked until operator-owned inputs are supplied.

state_taxonomy.meaning: A checked-in fixture or generated fixture response is scored by the real-world job runner. This is evidence for the benchmark contract, not live runtime behavior.
A Docker live-baseline adapter ran same-corpus or lifecycle checks, but no real-world job suite was scored through that project.
A project adapter materialized and scored real-world job records through a runtime or CLI path.
Source, setup, resource, retry, and output-contract metadata exists, but the project has not produced live adapter pass evidence.
A safe measurement cannot run without operator-owned credentials, private data, setup proof, or a dependency outside the lane.
The capability is out of scope for the project shape or would require a non-comparable path such as host-global state.
The system ran but missed expected memory, evidence, or answer terms.
Basic retrieval may work, but update, delete, reload, persistence, or cold-start behavior is wrong or incomplete.
The run did not reach the behavioral check because setup, install, dependency, or runtime execution failed.
The scenario is not currently encoded for that project or evidence class, so no pass or fail claim is allowed.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Evidence-linked source-of-truth memory service with real-world fixtures and live service retrieval sweeps.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Fixture production-ops keeps private corpus and provider credential gates blocked; live sweep keeps broader non-retrieval suites typed non-pass.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: A full-suite live_real_world pass plus separate private-corpus and credentialed production-ops evidence is required before broad live parity or production proof claims.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Keep borrowing qmd debug knobs, OpenViking staged trajectory, mem0 history, Letta core memory, and graph/RAG navigation patterns where they remain stronger.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Local retrieval-debug workflow with transparent CLI indexing, querying, expansion, fusion, and rerank ergonomics.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: The full live sweep passes targeted retrieval suites but keeps memory_evolution wrong_result and several broader suites not_encoded or incomplete.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Run qmd deep retrieval/debug profile and full-suite live real-world replay with trace-level diagnostics before claiming ELF wins, ties, or loses on retrieval debugging.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow transparent local knobs for query rewriting, weighted fusion, rerank explanation, and command-line replay.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Coding-agent continuity, MCP/REST packaging, viewer workflow, and durable cross-agent memory lifecycle.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Same-corpus retrieval can run, but durable cold-start and real-world job adapter coverage are blocked by the current adapter path.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Add a durable local adapter that covers update, delete, cold-start reload, work resume, capture/write policy, and lifecycle-staleness jobs.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow cross-agent hooks, packaging, continuity scenarios, and operator-visible viewer affordances.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Memory lifecycle, personalization, hosted/OpenMemory UI ergonomics, and optional graph memory.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Local OSS setup is represented, but hosted/OpenMemory UI parity and real-world personalization coverage are not encoded.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Fix the local adapter's same-corpus result, then encode memory_evolution, personalization, OpenMemory UI readback, and optional graph-context jobs.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow entity-scoped memory history, lifecycle surfaces, async update ergonomics, and OpenMemory-style inspection UX.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Markdown-first canonical store with rebuildable local index and practical hybrid retrieval.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Same-corpus retrieval is wrong_result and source-of-truth plus real-world reindex behavior is not yet cleanly scored.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Fix Docker same-corpus retrieval and reindex/update/delete reload evidence, then score source-of-truth and retrieval-debug real-world jobs.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow the canonical markdown-store ergonomics, local reindex clarity, and user-inspectable source files.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Filesystem-like context trajectory, hierarchical retrieval, and staged context loading.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Pinned Docker local embedding setup reaches add_resource/find, but same-corpus output misses expected evidence and trajectory jobs are not encoded.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: First make evidence-bearing same-corpus output pass, then run a context-trajectory suite that scores staged retrieval paths and hierarchy expansion.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow the viking-style filesystem context model, trajectory readback, and staged retrieval planning.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Progressive disclosure, automatic capture loop, repository-local lifecycle, and practical local viewer workflow.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Current Docker evidence is not a clean retrieval pass and progressive-disclosure jobs are not encoded.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Add durable repository-backed work_resume, operator_debugging_ux, capture/write-policy, and progressive-disclosure jobs.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow progressive disclosure, automatic capture review loops, and local viewer/operator comfort.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Full RAG application workflow with document, chunk, and reference evidence handles.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Research says adapter candidate, but Docker runtime proof and reference.chunks to benchmark evidence mapping must still run.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Run XY-885 tiny Docker evidence-smoke adapter and map RAGFlow reference chunks to scored retrieval/debug evidence.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow document/chunk reference surfaces, resource-envelope reporting, and RAG app evidence handles.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Lightweight graph/RAG context export with source file-path citation shape.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: The project is an adapter candidate, but retrieved-context export and real-world adapter scoring remain blocked.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Run XY-886 Docker context-export adapter with explicit LLM and embedding config plus source citation mapping.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow context-only query modes, graph-aware retrieval layout, and file-path citation readback.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: GraphRAG indexing, graph summaries, and document/text-unit evidence tables.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Cost-bounded Docker CLI/API and parquet outputs are identified, but indexing and evidence mapping have not passed.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Run XY-887 cost-bounded Docker adapter over a tiny corpus and score output tables against retrieval and knowledge-synthesis evidence.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow graph summary artifacts, local/global search separation, and source table evidence mapping.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Temporal graph memory with current, historical, and future fact validity windows.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Temporal graph memory is an adapter candidate, but Docker graph-store setup and real-world job scoring are blocked.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Run XY-888 Docker-local temporal graph adapter and score current versus historical fact validity with evidence ids.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow temporal fact windows, invalidation/supersession semantics, and graph fact provenance.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Core memory blocks versus archival memory with explicit operating-context surfaces.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Research-only until a supported contained server path can export core/archival evidence without relying on unsupported setup.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Select a contained evidence export contract, then encode core-vs-archival memory, personalization, and project-decision jobs.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow explicit core memory block ergonomics, archival separation, and shared operating context readback.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Checkpoint/replay regression workflow and durable state replay for agent runs.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Keep as a checkpoint/replay reference, not as a direct memory backend competitor until a comparable memory output contract exists.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Non-goal for direct win/loss until a standalone memory adapter contract exists; use replay regression jobs as a benchmark infrastructure reference.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow checkpoint replay, deterministic regression, and state-diff evaluation patterns.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Typed graph schema and query ergonomics for graph-lite developer experience.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Official shape is no server and no Docker path; use as graph-lite DX reference rather than adapter proof.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Non-goal for direct win/loss unless a contained memory-backed comparison target emerges; measure ELF graph-lite DX against typed schema/query acceptance instead.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow typed relation schema, query ergonomics, and small graph developer experience.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: LLM-maintained wiki or knowledge-page workflow with query-save and lint loops.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Research-only until a contained plugin or instruction harness can emit scored knowledge-page evidence.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Select a contained plugin or instruction harness, then score knowledge pages for citation coverage, unsupported claims, rebuild, and stale-source lint.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow maintained wiki workflows, page lint, query-save loops, and topic-scoped knowledge navigation.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Operational knowledge brain with compiled_truth pages, timelines, enrichment, and maintenance loops.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: Research remains blocked until a Docker-local brain repo and database path can be proven without operator-owned state.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: First prove Docker-local repository and database setup, then encode compiled_truth/timeline page scoring and operator-continuity jobs.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow compiled truth pages, timeline maintenance, and human-operable knowledge-brain navigation.

project_matrix.strongest_user_facing_scenario: Graph-compressed navigation with graph.json and GRAPH_REPORT evidence outputs.

unsupported_or_blocked_status.details: The tiny generated graph/report smoke scores wrong_result; broad graph navigation, rebuild behavior, private-corpus, and large-corpus quality remain not encoded.

project_matrix.benchmark_before_claim: Expand beyond the tiny generated smoke and score representative graph/RAG navigation jobs before any broad graphify quality or ELF comparison claim.
project_matrix.borrow_if_stronger: Borrow graph compression, source-location graph reports, and navigation hints for large code or document spaces.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed retrieval passes and ELF live_real_world retrieval passes in the full sweep.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: qmd live_real_world retrieval passes and qmd live_baseline_only checks pass, but qmd full-suite live status is wrong_result.
scenario_matrix.current_state: Measured tie on encoded retrieval answers; qmd remains stronger on local debug ergonomics not fully scored.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Run qmd deep retrieval/debug profile and ELF/qmd trace-level wrong-result replay with expansion, fusion, rerank, and candidate-drop diagnostics.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed work_resume passes and ELF live_real_world work_resume passes.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: agentmemory is live_baseline_only with lifecycle_fail; claude-mem is wrong_result; OpenViking work_resume is not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_state: ELF and qmd have current encoded live pass evidence, but continuity-oriented competitors remain undermeasured.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Encode durable agentmemory, claude-mem, and OpenViking work_resume adapters or declare each blocked with lifecycle/setup evidence.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed and live_real_world project_decisions suites pass.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: qmd live_real_world project_decisions passes; Letta project_decisions is research_gate not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_state: ELF and qmd are the only measured live competitors for this scenario.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Add core/archival decision-memory jobs for Letta only after a contained export path exists; otherwise keep Letta as design reference.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed trust_source_of_truth passes and ELF live_real_world trust_source_of_truth passes.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: memsearch has live_baseline_only canonical store evidence but trust_source_of_truth is incomplete and retrieval is wrong_result.
scenario_matrix.current_state: ELF has stronger measured source-of-truth evidence; memsearch remains a local-store ergonomics reference.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Fix memsearch same-corpus retrieval/reindex evidence, then run source-of-truth rebuild and reload jobs before any win/loss claim.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed memory_evolution passes, but ELF live_real_world memory_evolution is wrong_result.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: Graphiti/Zep is research_gate blocked; mem0/OpenMemory is live_baseline_only wrong_result.
scenario_matrix.current_state: No project has a comparable live pass for current-vs-historical evidence; ELF cannot claim live superiority yet.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Fix ELF/qmd live memory_evolution evidence links and run XY-888 Graphiti/Zep temporal graph adapter.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed consolidation passes, but live_real_world consolidation is not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: Manifest projects do not yet have live consolidation scoring; llm-wiki knowledge workflow is research_gate not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_state: Fixture-only ELF evidence is useful, but no live proposal-generation parity claim is allowed.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Run a reviewable consolidation-worker benchmark that emits proposals, source refs, unsupported-claim flags, and apply/discard/defer audit events.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed knowledge_compilation passes, but live_real_world knowledge_compilation is not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: llm-wiki and gbrain are research_gate not_encoded or blocked; GraphRAG remains research_gate blocked; graphify has a tiny live_real_world wrong_result smoke.
scenario_matrix.current_state: No live knowledge-page competitor pass exists; graphify has only bounded non-pass tiny-smoke evidence and ELF has fixture-backed derived-page evidence.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Encode live knowledge-page rebuild/lint scoring for ELF and run larger contained llm-wiki, gbrain, GraphRAG, or graphify adapters only after setup proof exists.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed operator_debugging_ux passes, but ELF live_real_world operator_debugging_ux is not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: qmd has local debug strengths but operator_debugging_ux is not_encoded in live sweeps; claude-mem and OpenMemory UX are not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_state: Operator debugging remains mostly product/UX evidence, not comparable live benchmark evidence.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Score trace hydration, candidate-stage attribution, raw-SQL avoidance, and repair-action clarity through live viewer or CLI artifacts.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed capture_integration passes, but ELF live_real_world capture_integration is not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: agentmemory capture_integration is blocked and claude-mem capture_integration is not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_state: ELF fixture evidence is strongest, but live capture and write-policy behavior still needs runtime scoring.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Run capture/write-policy jobs that prove redaction, exclusion, evidence binding, and no secret leakage through live ingestion paths.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF production runbooks and fixture production_ops cover restore, Qdrant rebuild, backfill resume, resource envelope, and typed private/credential blockers; live_real_world production_ops is incomplete.
scenario_matrix.strongest_competitor_or_reference: ELF production gate, qmd, RAG/RAGFlow resource gates
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: qmd live production_ops is incomplete; RAGFlow/GraphRAG/LightRAG resource gates are research_gate blocked.
scenario_matrix.current_state: ELF has the strongest checked-in production evidence, but private corpus and credentialed gates remain blocked.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Rerun private-corpus and credentialed production-ops gates only when operator-owned manifest and credentials are supplied.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF fixture-backed personalization passes and ELF live_real_world personalization passes.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: mem0/OpenMemory personalization is not_encoded and Letta personalization is research_gate not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_state: ELF and qmd have live encoded evidence; personalization-specialized competitors are not yet comparable.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Encode mem0/OpenMemory and Letta scoped-preference readback jobs before making personalization superiority claims.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF has trace and trajectory directions, but staged context trajectory is not yet a comparable live scenario.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: OpenViking Docker setup is pinned, same-corpus retrieval is wrong_result, and hierarchical trajectory is research_gate not_encoded.
scenario_matrix.current_state: OpenViking remains the strongest design reference, but not a measured live winner.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Make OpenViking same-corpus evidence-bearing retrieval pass, then score hierarchical expansion and staged context trajectory outputs.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF spec and admin surfaces define core blocks, but comparative benchmark coverage is not yet encoded here.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: Letta is research_gate not_encoded until a contained evidence export path is selected.
scenario_matrix.current_state: Scenario is a product gap measurement target, not a current win/loss surface.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Add core-block versus archival-search jobs for ELF and only compare Letta after contained export proof exists.

scenario_matrix.current_elf_evidence: ELF relation context and graph-lite work are not enough to claim graph/RAG navigation parity.
scenario_matrix.current_competitor_evidence: RAGFlow, LightRAG, GraphRAG, and Graphiti/Zep remain research_gate blocked or incomplete; graphify has a tiny live_real_world wrong_result smoke.
scenario_matrix.current_state: No RAG/graph project has live_real_world pass evidence; graphify supplies only bounded non-pass tiny-smoke evidence.
scenario_matrix.next_measurement: Run larger Docker-contained adapters and require evidence-linked outputs before any graph/RAG navigation claim.

parallelizable_followups.measurement: Stress profile plus trace-level retrieval-debug artifacts for qmd and ELF.

parallelizable_followups.issue_or_candidate: [ELF benchmark P0] Make external adapters lifecycle-durable and fail-typed
parallelizable_followups.measurement: Update, delete, cold-start reload, work_resume, and capture/write-policy jobs.

parallelizable_followups.blocked_by: Comparable local OSS path for UI/readback evidence.
parallelizable_followups.measurement: Same-corpus fix plus memory_evolution, personalization, and OpenMemory inspection jobs.

parallelizable_followups.blocked_by: Docker same-corpus retrieval and reindex correctness.
parallelizable_followups.measurement: Canonical markdown store, rebuild/reindex, retrieval, update/delete/reload jobs.

parallelizable_followups.issue_or_candidate: new benchmark issue after evidence output fix
parallelizable_followups.measurement: Hierarchical expansion, staged trajectory, and resume/retrieval evidence jobs.

parallelizable_followups.blocked_by: Durable repository path and progressive-disclosure output contract.
parallelizable_followups.measurement: Work resume, operator debugging, capture/write-policy, and progressive disclosure jobs.

parallelizable_followups.blocked_by: Resource envelope accepted for tiny Docker smoke.
Docker service setup and explicit provider config.
parallelizable_followups.measurement: Retrieved context export and source file-path citations.
Document, text-unit, graph-summary, and citation output tables.
Current/historical/future fact validity and evidence ids.

parallelizable_followups.blocked_by: Representative graph/RAG navigation and quality proof beyond the tiny generated smoke.
parallelizable_followups.measurement: Graph/report evidence over representative graph/RAG jobs, with graph.json and GRAPH_REPORT outputs mapped to scored evidence ids.

parallelizable_followups.workstream: Private corpus and credentialed production ops
parallelizable_followups.blocked_by: Sanitized private manifest and routed provider credentials.
parallelizable_followups.measurement: Private-corpus retrieval quality and credentialed production-ops pass/fail evidence.

parallelizable_followups.workstream: Letta, LangGraph, nanograph, llm-wiki direct adapters
parallelizable_followups.blocked_by: Contained evidence export or non-memory-backend comparability contract.
parallelizable_followups.measurement: Only run after each has a comparable output contract; otherwise treat as product-reference evidence.
